source: synthetic_estimated — Campaign Manager not accessed. Spend estimated from SC_Data_2026-04-14 campaign totals. Keyword-level data carried from 2026-04-13.
data_quality: ESTIMATED — All PPC metrics estimated. Campaign Manager inaccessible (13th consecutive day without access). Spend estimates derived from SC_Data_2026-04-14. 2 attributed sales this period.

summary.overall_acos_7d_note: 2 attributed sales at $99.98 on $91.00 spend — ACoS steady at 91%. Week 3 of consecutive ad conversions. Trend suggests manual campaign is finding its footing.
summary.organic_rank_savings_note: No organic rank for any tracked keyword — zero overlap savings available

wow_comparison.note: 3rd consecutive week with ad conversions. Daily spend rate and ACoS stable. Auto campaign wasted spend ($21) unchanged — remains top optimization lever. Priority: access Campaign Manager to pull search terms before pausing auto campaign.

keyword_analysis.organic_rank_note: No organic rank — PPC is the only traffic source for this keyword
keyword_analysis.efficiency_note: Third consecutive conversion week on primary keyword. ACoS 43.2% — still above 33.5% breakeven but trend is positive. Hold bid, monitor for week 4.
keyword_analysis.recommendation: MONITOR — 3rd consecutive week with conversions. ACoS improving but not yet at breakeven. Hold bids for one more week.
keyword_analysis.flag: POSITIVE: Third consecutive conversion week on primary keyword

keyword_analysis.keyword: cat water fountain stainless steel wireless
keyword_analysis.efficiency_note: 2nd consecutive week BELOW breakeven ACoS (32.4% vs 33.5% threshold). Most efficient keyword in portfolio. Strong case for bid increase.
keyword_analysis.recommendation: INCREASE BID — ACoS 32.4% below breakeven for 2nd consecutive week. Raise bid 10-15% to capture more impression share.
keyword_analysis.flag: POSITIVE: 2nd consecutive week below-breakeven ACoS on long-tail keyword

keyword_analysis.recommendation: ADD TO CAMPAIGN — high intent, low competition keyword. Add as exact match at $1.20 bid.

keyword_analysis.keyword: automatic dog water fountain stainless steel
keyword_analysis.recommendation: EVALUATE — Dog-focused keyword not currently targeted. Add title test first (EXP-023) before bidding.

keyword_analysis.efficiency_note: Zero sales from auto campaign for 13th consecutive day. 19 clicks, $21 wasted. Urgency to act increasing.
keyword_analysis.recommendation: PAUSE or reduce budget to $5/day — persistent wasted spend. Mine search terms first if CM accessible.
keyword_analysis.flag: WASTE: $21 spend, 0 sales — auto campaign not converting (13 days)

top_actions.action: Pause or reduce Close Automatic Campaign to $5/day
top_actions.rationale: Auto campaign has generated zero sales for 13+ consecutive days. At $21/week, this is the single largest P&L drag available to fix immediately.

top_actions.action: Increase bid on 'cat water fountain stainless steel wireless' by 10-15%
top_actions.expected_impact: More impression share on 2nd consecutive below-breakeven keyword
top_actions.rationale: ACoS 32.4% is below 33.5% breakeven for the 2nd straight week — this keyword is demonstrably profitable. Scale it.

top_actions.action: Access Campaign Manager to pull auto campaign search terms
top_actions.expected_impact: Harvest converting terms before pausing auto campaign
top_actions.rationale: Before pausing the auto campaign, extract any hidden converting search terms to add to manual campaign. This intelligence has value.

top_actions.action: Add 'small dog water fountain wireless' as exact match at $1.20 bid
top_actions.rationale: Paw Pure works for dogs too. Untapped keyword with purchase intent.

top_actions.action: Run title A/B test adding 'small dogs' (EXP-023)
top_actions.expected_impact: Improve relevance for 4,800 SV dog keyword
top_actions.rationale: Dog keywords represent significant untapped volume. Title change needed before PPC can efficiently target dog audience.

top_action_this_week: Access Campaign Manager, harvest auto campaign search terms, then pause auto campaign — estimated $98/week savings with zero sacrifice in attributed sales
